collectives.allgather_launcher.detail: High-level plan API exists, but execution requires an attached symmetric heap.

collectives.allreduce_launcher.detail: High-level plan API exists, but execution requires an attached symmetric heap.

collectives.reduce_scatter_launcher.detail: No attached symmetric heap; execution path is unavailable.

allreduce.in_place.detail: Stable public in-place host contract: contiguous tensor on the attached symmetric heap. The current public fast path does not require tensor.numel to be divisible by world_size.

gemm_allgather.shard/full.detail: Stable public host contract: A(M,K) full LHS, B(K,N/world_size) rank-local RHS shard, C(M,N) full output. Runtime availability inherits the validated allgather path for the current heap mode/transport.

gemm_allscatter.full/full.detail: Stable public contract for full RHS and full output buffers.

gemm_allscatter.full/shard.detail: High-level wrapper materializes a heap-backed full output, then returns the rank-local shard.

gemm_allscatter.shard/full.detail: Rejected intentionally: current shard/shard gemm_allscatter execution is a peer-scatter contract, not a stable local-shard basis for full-output assembly.

gemm_reducescatter.full/shard.detail: Stable public host contract: A(M,K) local contribution, B(K,N) full RHS, C(M,N/world_size) rank-local shard. Runtime availability inherits the validated reduce_scatter path for the current heap mode/transport.

reduce_scatter.device.detail: No attached symmetric heap; execution path is unavailable.

reduce_scatter.reference.detail: No attached symmetric heap; execution path is unavailable.

symmetric_heap.allocator_memory_model.detail: Attach a heap before querying allocator memory-model metadata.

symmetric_heap.current_runtime.detail: Context is valid without a heap, but collective/high-level heap-backed ops are unavailable.

symmetric_heap.device_remote_access.detail: No attached symmetric heap; Triton remote device access is unavailable.

symmetric_heap.exportable_segment_metada.detail: Attach a heap before querying exportable segment metadata.

symmetric_heap.external_import.detail: Attach a heap before using external import/as_symmetric helpers.

symmetric_heap.external_mapping.detail: Attach a heap to inspect allocator external-mapping capability. The current default torch_bump backend does not implement zero-copy external mapping.

symmetric_heap.external_memory_interface.detail: Attach a heap before querying allocator external-memory interface metadata.

symmetric_heap.peer_import_metadata.detail: Attach a heap before querying peer-import metadata.

symmetric_heap.peer_mapping_metadata.detail: Attach a heap before querying peer export/import mapping metadata.

symmetric_heap.peer_segment_catalog.detail: Attach a heap before querying segment-scoped peer export/import catalogs.

symmetric_heap.segment_layout.detail: Attach a heap before querying allocator segment-layout metadata.

symmetric_heap.segment_metadata.detail: Attach a heap before querying allocator-owned segment metadata.

symmetric_heap_allocator_first_import_ma.detail: Allocator-first canonical import/map layer requires an attached heap.

allgather.detail: High-level plan API exists, but execution requires an attached symmetric heap.

allreduce.detail: High-level plan API exists, but execution requires an attached symmetric heap.

gemm_allgather.detail: High-level host contract exists, but execution requires an attached symmetric heap for the local shard workspace and allgather output path.

gemm_allscatter.detail: High-level plan API exists, but current execution still requires an attached symmetric heap.

gemm_reducescatter.detail: High-level host contract exists, but execution requires an attached symmetric heap for the reduce_scatter output path and workspaces.

reduce_scatter.detail: No attached symmetric heap; execution path is unavailable.
